title: ExperienceItem
description: A single learning experience recorded from task execution.

experience_id.description: Unique identifier. Format: exp-{12 hex chars from uuid4}.

skill_id.description: The skill this experience belongs to.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. Must end with Z.

task_signature.description: Normalized task type that produced this experience.

lesson.description: The reusable insight extracted from this execution.

reasoning.description: Optional detailed reasoning behind the feedback extraction.

execution_id.description: Reference to the execution that produced this experience.

cross_rollout_critique.description: Optional cross-rollout comparison critique (inspired by XSKILL).
